description: Bulks USB d'assignation (Preset33 / HX Edit). Chaque entrée inclut name, category, subCategory pour le picker (ordre fichier = ordre hardware). Patch runtime : compteurs, cd:03|cd:04, 82:62. Each entry includes `edOpcode` (bytes 4..7 of `bulkHex`, e.g. `0310ed03` or `8010ed03`) so transport variants are explicit and not inferred from notes.
